name: Nix: Ashes of the Phoenix
short_description: Ashes of the Phoenix is a survivor style, Roguelite ARPG experience set in a dark high fantasy world. The story follows Nix, a mysterious heroine, as she battles her way through hordes of enemies to uncover the mystery that is the world around her.
detailed_description:
Hold onto your hats! This game is still a tender sprout in the garden - in early access, mind you - but we're spicing it up with fresh content each week!

Introducing Nix, the dauntless warrior who's got her Taoist arts down pat. She's traversed a realm that's more higgledy-piggledy than a rush-hour traffic, warding off all kinds of twisted baddies itching to claim her scalp.

But don't you worry! Armed with her trusty spellbook and a steadfast ally, Nix is all set to dance the dangerous tango!

Game Highlights

  • Potent spells at your disposal
  • Spruce up your magic with spell augments
  • Buddies straight out of mythological central casting
  • Swarms of enemies just itching for a showdown
  • Buffs so robust, they'd put a bodybuilder to shame
  • Hoard gold, amp up your power, and show those villains who's boss
  • Level up, wreak havoc, and revel in the ensuing chaos
  • A host of unique bosses to battle, each within its own distinct terrain

Want to chew the fat or just hang out? Swing by our Discord!
